data.current_description: Retrieves current meeting statistics including total rooms and peers.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves current meeting statistics including total active rooms, connected peers, and system metrics. Returns a StatsResponse object containing aggregated data across all active meetings. No authentication required for this endpoint.
data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and lacks clarity about what specific metrics are returned and the response structure. Added details about response schema, aggregation scope, and authentication requirements to help AI agents understand the operation's full context and output.

message: Operation 'listMeetings' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks specificity about response structure and authentication requirements. Added details about the response schema (MeetingsResponse), what Meeting objects contain, and authentication requirement to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of all active meetings with participant details.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all currently active meetings with participant details for each meeting. Returns a MeetingsResponse object containing an array of Meeting objects, each with room identifier and peer information. Requires API key authentication.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about response structure and authentication requirements. Added details about the response schema (MeetingsResponse), what Meeting objects contain, and authentication requirement to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'createMeeting' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Current description is too brief and lacks important context. Added details about authentication requirement, response schema, meeting lifecycle, and what constitutes a unique meeting identifier to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Creates a new meeting room and returns the meeting identifier.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new meeting room and returns the meeting identifier. Generates a unique room ID for the meeting. Requires API key authentication. Returns a MeetingResponse object containing the newly created meeting details. The meeting remains active until explicitly ended or all participants disconnect.
data.reasoning: Current description is too brief and lacks important context. Added details about authentication requirement, response schema, meeting lifecycle, and what constitutes a unique meeting identifier to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'endMeeting' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, missing_context. Description lacks clarity about required parameters, response structure, and side effects. Added details about the room parameter requirement, authentication, response schema, and explicit side effects (peer disconnection, room closure, redirect behavior) for better AI agent understanding of the operation's impact.

data.current_description: Terminates a meeting and optionally redirects participants to a specified URL.
data.description_suggestion: Terminates an active meeting identified by room parameter and optionally redirects all participants to a specified URL. Requires API key authentication. Returns an EndMeetingResponse with termination status and details. Side effects: disconnects all active peers, closes the meeting room, and triggers optional redirect if configured in the EndMeetingRequest body.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about required parameters, response structure, and side effects. Added details about the room parameter requirement, authentication, response schema, and explicit side effects (peer disconnection, room closure, redirect behavior) for better AI agent understanding of the operation's impact.

message: Operation 'createToken' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks details about response structure, authentication requirement, and token usage context. Added information about response schema (TokenResponse), API key authentication requirement, and clarification about how the token is used in meeting access scenarios to improve AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Issues an authentication token with configurable expiration and presenter permissions.
data.description_suggestion: Issues an authentication token with configurable expiration time and presenter permissions for meeting access. Requires API key authentication. Returns a TokenResponse object containing the generated token string. The token can be used to authenticate participants joining meetings with elevated privileges based on presenter settings.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about response structure, authentication requirement, and token usage context. Added information about response schema (TokenResponse), API key authentication requirement, and clarification about how the token is used in meeting access scenarios to improve AI agent understanding.
